```{r Overall antibiotic use rates table}
total_ab_rates_overall |>
  bind_rows(total_ab_rates_overall_quartiles) |>
  select("ab_use_density","substance_use_density")|>
  bind_cols(tibble(rate = c("Pooled mean","Q1","Median","Q3"))) |>
  pivot_longer(c("ab_use_density","substance_use_density")) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = rate) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "name")
```
